commands.review_summary:
The branch clears `dashboardRoute`'s `discoverLanguage` when the root dashboard is using `period=releasebar` and adds a regression assertion for that route.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `dashboardRoute("/", "?period=releasebar&hotLang=TypeScript")` routes to `/api/_hot` while retaining `discoverLanguage` from `hotLang`; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the diff has no definite code defect; merge review is gated on contributor-provided real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: clear ReleaseBar Hot language state
target.body:
## Summary
- clear `hotLang` route state when the root dashboard is using `period=releasebar`
- keep the API route on `/api/_hot` while preventing the UI from marking an ignored language filter active
- add a routing regression assertion

## Verification
- npm run test
- npm run lint
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build:app
- npx oxfmt --check src/routing.ts scripts/lib/dashboard.test.ts
target.author: tanish19078
